title: Israel operated from Iraq's Najaf desert during war: Reports
summary_full: Israeli forces reportedly established a temporary base on an old airstrip in Iraq's Najaf desert during the war against Iran, according to security officials. The operation, coordinated with the US, led to clashes with Iraqi troops. While no forces remain, equipment may have been left behind. Iraq had previously protested an air raid in the area.
